characters.description: AbigailSeason(s):1,2First Episode:Page 47Last Episode:The CounteragentFamily:aliveOccupation:NewspaperAffiliation(s):NewspaperPortrayed by:Michelle Arthur

characters.name: Saeed Akhtar
characters.description: Saeed AkhtarSeason(s):2First Episode:2.8 Passage (Part 1)Last Episode:2.8 Passage (Part 1)Status:DeceasedPortrayed by:Shishir KurupOccupation:CIA Operative Saeed Akhtarwas an IndianCIAcontact. He was also a good friend ofJack Bristow. Vaughncontacted Saeed immediately afterSydney,her mother, and her father arrived inIndia, telling him to meet at the rendevous point. At night, Sydney and her parents met Saeed near a dark field of trees and he supplied them with the gear they needed to infiltrateCuvee'scompound.

characters.name: Angry Punk Girl
characters.description: Angry Punk GirlSeason(s):4Status:AlivePortrayed by:Vicky Shen Angry Punk Girlwas a punk club civilian. The punk girl was dancing inside of a club inShanghaiwhen she desperately needed to use the restroom. She walked over to the bathroom and started banging on the door of the club, unaware thatSydneyandBrodienwere both inside fleeing a group of hostiles. Sydney quickly changed Brodien's appearance to that of a Goth, but needed a disguise of her own. As the punk girl's impatient banging continued, Sydney ran over to the door and opened it, asking how badly she had to go. Before the girl could move, Sydney pulled her into the bathroom. She knocked her out and stole her clothes. Dressed in them, she emerged from the restroom and escaped undetected.

characters.name: Anna
characters.description: AnnaSeason(s):4Status:AlivePortrayed by:Liza SenecaOccupation:Student Annawas a Dutch student. While learning english in one of her college classes,her teacherrepeatedly asked her to turn off her cell phone. Anna flashed Cahill an odd look because she pulled out her phone which wasn't ringing at all. Anna's teacher began to freak out and left the class, puttinganother studentin charge.

characters.name: Avian
characters.description: AvianSeason(s):4First Episode:A Clean ConscienceLast Episode:MirageStatus:Deceased (Throat Slit byElena Derevko)Portrayed by:Oz PerkinsOccupation:TerroristAffiliation(s):Elena Derevko Avian"Coke-Bottle Glasses" was a member ofThe Covenantwho worked very closely with Elena Derevko. He was an expert in hacking and explosives. Avian was sent toAmsterdamto observe a meet betweenMilos KradicandLinus Halsey, where he wound up finding out thatVaughncaptured the real Halsey and replaced him withDixon. Later, Avian toldAleksander Petrovich, one of Kradic's men, that Dixon was working for theCIA. AfterRaimestook the blame for Dixon, Kradic and his men traveled toViennato collect a weapon calledHydrosek. Avian later called Elena and told her what happened, saying he wouldn't fail her(A Clean Conscience).

characters.name: Dr. Judy Barnett
characters.description: Dr. Judith BarnettSeason(s):1,2,3First Episode:The Box (Part 1)Last Episode:HourglassFamily:AliveOccupation:PsychiatristAffiliation(s):CIAPortrayed by:Patricia Wettig Dr. Judith Barnettwas a psychiatrist that worked for the CIA.  Although she was highly accomplished and had an ivy league education, she came to the CIA because she wanted to serve her country(After Six). She met with several of their field operatives to discuss the psychology repercussion of their work as well as problems in their personal lives.  Her patients included Sydney Bristow, Michael Vaughn, Jack Bristow, Arvin Sloane, and Marcus Dixon.  She had a very brief affair with Sloane.

characters.name: Eduardo Benegas
characters.description: Eduardo BenegasSeason(s):1Status:AlivePortrayed by:Luis MedinaOccupation:Spanish VC Eduardo Benegaswas aSpanish VCand Auto enthusiast. He also owned the largest collection of pornographic art in all ofMadrid. He also owned aRambaldisketch thatSD-6was keen to get a hold of. He kept the key to the piece on his person at all times. Benegas was surrounded at all times by around six bodyguards, trained under special forces. SD-6negotiated with Benegas to purchase the Rambaldi sketch but the offer fell through.Sloanesuspected thatK-Directoratetipped him off to the true value of the piece, as well as stealing the key that accessed the piece.Anna Espinosaseduced Benegas and took it from him while his guard was down.

characters.name: Charlie Bernard
characters.description: Charlie BernardSeason(s):1First Episode:So It BeginsLast Episode:The CoupStatus:AlivePortrayed by:Evan ParkeOccupation:Singer Charlie BernardwasFrancie’sboyfriend turned into fiancé then ex-fiance. Charlie helpedSydneymove into her new home a few months afterDannyhad been killed. He hung out with Francie’s friends regularly, and even got them involved in some of his miscellaneous events, such as his dinner with a member from a corporate law college that gave him an offer to join(So It Begins). But despite having what seemed to be a perfect relationship with Francie, she thought he was cheating on her. Sydney and Francie spied on Charlie one night and found out he was sneaking out and visiting a woman namedRachel. When Francie confronted him about the woman over dinner, he told her that she was just a friend and they were only “hanging out.” Francie didn’t believe him, and left the restaurant in a huff(A Broken Heart).

characters.name: Martin Bishop
characters.description: Martin BishopSeason(s):4Status:Deceased (Shot to death byNadia Santos)Occupation:Criminal Martin Bishopwas a criminal who stole theValta computerfor theBaden-Liga. He was British, but lived in Spain, and had a reputation as a womaniser. He specialises in acquiring high-risk, high-reward military targets. Bishop was being driven down a country road inAndalusiawhen he saw an overturned car withSydney Bristowin it. He pulled over and helped her out before the car exploded, not realizing that it was all set up byAPOto get Sydney into his house. He invited her back to clean up, which she accepted. He left to attend to some business, and told her to stay within the house and not to go in the grounds.

characters.name: Bloom
characters.description: Professor BloomSeason(s):1Status:UnknownPortrayed by:Peter DennisOccupation:Professor Professor Bloomwas a guest at a party taking place inOxford. In order to obtain a keycard that gained access to the vault within the building,Anna Espinosaengaged in conversation with Bloom posing as a journalist. She started out by inadvertently making him confess that his department received ancient technology fromTunisia. She then requested to see his lab.

characters.name: Laszlo Bogdan
characters.description: Laszlo BogdanSeason(s):3Status:Deceased (Ebola)Portrayed by:Ray ProsciaOccupation:MercenaryAffiliation(s):Simon Walker/The Covenant Laszlo Bogdanwas a freelancing mercenary working forSimon WalkerandThe Covenant. He was infected withEbola. Simon Walker and his crew of mercenaries were sent to France to steal a set of viruses from a laboratory. While leaving, one of the vials broke and Laszlo was exposed with a fatal amount of the virus. Upon discovery, he was transported to the U.S.Stafford Naval Hospital.

characters.name: Ned Bolger
characters.description: Ned BolgerSeason(s):4First Episode:PandoraLast Episode:In Dreams...Status:AliveOccupation:SloaneimposterAffiliation(s):The CovenantPortrayed by:Joel Grey Ned Bolgerwas a member ofThe Covenant, who had a brain identical toArvin Sloane's. Ned was born inMichiganand was a corporal within the U.S. army.

characters.description: Ned BolgerSeason(s):4First Episode:PandoraLast Episode:In Dreams...Status:AliveOccupation:SloaneimposterAffiliation(s):The CovenantPortrayed by:Joel Grey Ned Bolgerwas a member ofThe Covenant, who had a brain identical toArvin Sloane's. characters.name: Kazari Bomani
characters.description: Kazari BomaniSeason(s):3First Episode:RepercussionsLast Episode:UnveiledAffiliation(s):The CovenantPortrayed by:Djimon Hounsou Kazari Bomani was a member ofThe Covenantand the largest arms dealer in Africa. Kazari Bomani, a kingpin in The Covenant, kidnapsArvin Sloanewho, fearing torture, says he can legitimize Bomani.  Sloane is eventually set free "in exchange for information."   Bomani is later shot and killed byJulian Sark.

characters.name: Carrie Bowman
characters.description: Carrie BowmanSeason(s):2,3,4,5First Episode:CountdownLast Episode:ReprisalStatus:AliveOccupation:NSA AgentCIA AgentAffiliation(s):CIAPortrayed by:Amanda Foreman Carrie Bowmanis anNSAagent and wife ofMarshall Flinkman. Carrie is introduced in Season 2, where she worked at theCIAheadquarters inLos Angeleswith Marshall. Eventually the two formed a relationship resulting in marriage and the birth of their son,Mitchell. This, of course, happened in typical Marshall fashion. The two decided they were to be wed before the birth of the baby, but Carrie began to go into labor in the middle of an important mission. Marshall quickly enlistsEric Weissto become legally ordained online (through the "Internet Church of Mammals") so he can marry the two (while Marshall continues to guideSydneyandVaughnthrough their mission), bolting at the last second to take his wife to the hospital.

characters.name: Frederick Brandon
characters.description: Frederick BrandonSeason(s):2First Episode:CountdownLast Episode:The TellingStatus:Deceased (Shot to death bySloane's Henchmen)Portrayed by:Jonathan BanksOccupation:NSA Deputy DirectorAffiliation(s):NSA Frederick Brandonwas the Deputy Director of the NSA. He andCarrie Bowmanwere assigned to help theCIAlocateRambaldiartifacts. Frederick appeared inside CIA headquarters during the briefing onProteo di Regno. He introduced himself and Carrie before telling everyone aboutDi Regno's heart, which contained dates about natural disasters. He then informed everyone that the next disaster would happen in forty-eight hours and that they needed to find a way to stop it.

characters.name: Brezzel
characters.description: BrezzelSeason(s):3First Episode:ConsciousLast Episode:RemnantsStatus:Deceased (Morphine Overdose caused byJulian Sark)Portrayed by:David CronenbergOccupation:Neurologist Dr. Brezzelwas a neurologist who liked to experiment with his patients dreams, usually with cocktails or other types of drugs. He also had a fondness of facon. After becoming a fugitive fromRobert Lindseyand the CIA,Sydneywas determined to find out what happened to her in the past two years of her life. So she andher fathercontacted Brezzel, who was a neurologist who liked to subconsciously play with people's dreams...while they were unconscious. Brezzel strapped Sydney to a machine and he and Jack analyzed Sydney's dreams, which yielded a valuable result:Will Tippin.

characters.name: Jean Briault
characters.description: Jean BriaultSeason(s):1Status:Deceased (Shot to death byArvin Sloane)Portrayed by:Castulo GuerraOccupation:Alliance of Twelve operative Jean Briaultwas one ofSloane'svery close friends since the Intervention of the CIA in Chile During the Goverment ofSalvador Allende. He was also aligned withThe Alliance of Twelve. After receiving evidence and money transactions that showed Jean working withAlexander Khasinau, Sloane andEdward Poolecontemplated about how they should deal with Jean. Although Poole said that their last option should be killing Jean, Sloane eventually discovered that it would be best to kill him.

characters.name: Bridget
characters.description: BridgetSeason(s):4Status:Deceased (Shot to death bySydney Bristow)Affiliation(s):Boris TamborPortrayed by:Olga Vilner BridgetwasBoris Tambor'sgirlfriend. She was killed bySydney Bristow. Bridget was always angry or irritated with him because he never spent any time with her and Tambor frequently abused her due to his own personal problems. Bridget finally got to spend some quality time with some friends at a bar (who were reallyNadiaandSydneyin disguise). She unknowingly granted them access to Boris' PDA and they were able to find out where Tambor was making his next deal.

characters.name: Thomas Brill
characters.description: Thomas BrillSeason(s):3First Episode:Breaking PointLast Episode:BloodtiesStatus:AliveOccupation:CIAoperative (formerly)Affiliation(s):CIA(formerly)Portrayed by:Richard Roundtree

characters.name: Jack Bristow
characters.description: Jack BristowSeason(s):1,2,3,4,5First Episode:Truth Be ToldLast Episode:All The Time In The WorldStatus:Deceased (Suicide by Dynamite Explosion)Occupation:Field Agent,APODirectorAffiliation(s):SD-6,CIA,APOPortrayed by:Victor Garber Jonathan "Jack" Donahue Bristow(16 March 1950-22 May 2006)  was the father ofSydney Bristowand a fellow double agent for theCIAatSD-6. He assisted his daughter in bringing down the criminal organization and assisted the CIA at their base of operations in Los Angeles thereafter. He was recruited toAPO, a black ops division of the CIA, by former superior at SD-6Arvin Sloane, who ultimately betrayed the U.S. government in pursuit of the findings ofMilo Rambaldi. Jack was left in charge of APO after this. In a final effort to stop Sloane, Jack sacrificed his own life to trap an immortalized Sloane in a cave for the rest of eternity.

characters.name: Jack Bristow
characters.description: Jack BristowSeason(s):1,2,3,4,5First Episode:Truth Be ToldLast Episode:All The Time In The WorldStatus:Deceased (Suicide by Dynamite Explosion)Occupation:Field Agent,APODirectorAffiliation(s):SD-6,CIA,APOPortrayed by:Victor Garber Jonathan "Jack" Donahue Bristow(16 March 1950-22 May 2006)  was the father ofSydney Bristowand a fellow double agent for theCIAatSD-6. He assisted his daughter in bringing down the criminal organization and assisted the CIA at their base of operations in Los Angeles thereafter. He was recruited toAPO, a black ops division of the CIA, by former superior at SD-6Arvin Sloane, who ultimately betrayed the U.S. government in pursuit of the findings ofMilo Rambaldi. Jack was left in charge of APO after this. In a final effort to stop Sloane, Jack sacrificed his own life to trap an immortalized Sloane in a cave for the rest of eternity.

characters.name: Sydney Bristow
characters.description: Seven years before the events ofSeason 1, whilst in her freshman year at college, Sydney was recruited toSD-6, a supposed black ops division of theCIA. She worked in the cover location, Credit Dauphine, for six months before undergoing eight months of physical training before being taken to the real SD-6(Q&A). Soon after joining, Sydney took a cheque to her father to repay him for his payment of her college funds. When she told him that she had started working for Credit Dauphine, Jack became agitated and told her to quit, realizing that Sloane had enlisted her to work at SD-6, which he knew to be a criminal organization. Sydney refused and left angrily, saying that she could do what she wanted(All The Time In The World). She quickly passed through all the tests that SD-6 had to offer, with the officers there telling her that she was "a natural". She continued her studies at college despite the fact that head of SD-6,Arvin Sloane, disliked it. Her cover with her friends was that she was working at the bank, Credit Dauphine(Truth Be Told)Sydney BristowSeason(s):1, 2, 3, 4, 5First Episode:Truth Be ToldLast Episode:All The Time In The WorldStatus:AliveAlias(es):Kate JonesJoanna Kelly Julia Thorne Bluebird Freelancer Mountaineer  Phoenix  Amy Tippin  Anna EspinosaOccupation:SD-6 field agentCIA field agent The Covenant assassin (DSR double agent) APO field agentAffiliation(s):SD-6,CIA, The Covenant  (DSR), APO.Portrayed by:Jennifer GarnerShe datedDaniel Hechtfor two years before Season 1(Truth Be Told). She was friends withWill Tippinfor three years before Season 1(So It Begins). Joanna Kelly Julia Thorne Bluebird Freelancer Mountaineer  Phoenix  Amy Tippin  Anna Espinosa CIA field agent The Covenant assassin (DSR double agent) APO field agent

characters.name: Brodien
characters.description: BrodienSeason(s):4First Episode:Authorized Personnel Only (Part 1)Last Episode:Before The FloodStatus:DeceasedPortrayed by:Rob BenedictOccupation:Field AgentAffiliation(s):CIA Brodienwas aCIAagent. Brodien andSydneywere on a surveillance mission in Shanghai when their cover was blown and they were chased by numerous thugs down the city streets. Sydney and Brodien ran into a club rave and locked themselves in the bathroom, trying to figure out how they'd escape the assailants. Over Sydney's radio, Sydney and Brodien could hear their other CIA agent codenamed Shopkeeper getting slain.

characters.name: Brodien
characters.description: BrodienSeason(s):4First Episode:Authorized Personnel Only (Part 1)Last Episode:Before The FloodStatus:DeceasedPortrayed by:Rob BenedictOccupation:Field AgentAffiliation(s):CIA Brodienwas aCIAagent. Brodien andSydneywere on a surveillance mission in Shanghai when their cover was blown and they were chased by numerous thugs down the city streets. Sydney and Brodien ran into a club rave and locked themselves in the bathroom, trying to figure out how they'd escape the assailants. Over Sydney's radio, Sydney and Brodien could hear their other CIA agent codenamed Shopkeeper getting slain.

characters.name: Burnett
characters.description: BurnettSeason(s):1Status:AlivePortrayed by:Kevin MitnickOccupation:CIA Agent Burnettis aCIAagent. Burnett was in the safehouse along withVaughn,WeissandSydneyafter they abductedJeroen Schiller. Burnett announced to Vaughn that they were in and told Sydney they had Kelvin giveSloaneaccess to a fake website that had information about theHensel Vaccine Inhalerto keepSD-6occupied for months. In other words, the CIA had access to all of their accounts and contacts. Burnett then said the whole play was Vaughn's idea, much to Sydney's surprise.

characters.name: Businessman
characters.description: BusinessmanSeason(s):4Status:Deceased (Elevator accident caused byNed Bolger)Portrayed by:Tony ColittiAffiliation(s):Ned BolgerThe Businessmanwas one ofNed Bolger'shenchman. The businessman met withRobertsinside of a hotel after Roberts calledCarterthe previous day. Roberts was supposed to meet with Carter, but instead, Bolger sent him. The businessman said he was there to check Roberts for weapons and scanned his body with a metal detector to be sure he was clean. The businessman said the meeting was moved to the top floor and they got into the elevator to travel up. During the ride, Bolger spotted a disguisedSydneyand knew that something was off. Just as Roberts and the businessman arrived at the top floor, Bolger activated a set of explovies above the elevator and it began to fall. Roberts and the businessman were thrown into the air and Roberts screamed horribly until it landed on the ground, killing them instantly.

characters.name: Jason Cahill
characters.description: Jason CahillSeason(s):4First Episode:NocturneLast Episode:NocturneStatus:Deceased (Shot in the Back byJack Bristow)Portrayed by:Will SchaubOccupation:Field OperativeAffiliation(s):CIAJason Cahillwas aCIAagent infected with a hhallucinogen He was the husband of Nancy Cahill. During their time in Amsterdam, bothNancyand Jason were infected with a powerful hallucinogen. Jason became feral and extremely hostile so Nancy was forced to lock him inside a secret passageway in their house. After Nancy shot and killed herself,APOsentJack andSydneyto his house, where Sydney found Jason. Inside the passageway, she found rotten food and several drawings of demonic figures and symbols. Jason attacked her from behind and bit her on the neck, vomiting up blood and infecting her with the pathogen in the process. Before he could do further damage, Jack arrived and shot Jason in the back.

characters.name: Jason Cahill

During their time in Amsterdam, bothNancyand Jason were infected with a powerful hallucinogen. Jason became feral and extremely hostile so Nancy was forced to lock him inside a secret passageway in their house. After Nancy shot and killed herself,APOsentJack andSydneyto his house, where Sydney found Jason. Inside the passageway, she found rotten food and several drawings of demonic figures and symbols. Jason attacked her from behind and bit her on the neck, vomiting up blood and infecting her with the pathogen in the process. Before he could do further damage, Jack arrived and shot Jason in the back.

characters.name: Nancy Cahill
characters.description: Nancy CahillSeason(s):4First Episode:NocturneLast Episode:NocturneStatus:Deceased (Suicide by Gunshot)Portrayed by:Julie Ann EmeryOccupation:Field Operative, ProfessorAffiliation(s):CIANancy Cahillwas an undercover CIA agent posing as a professor at the University in Amsterdam. She was the wife ofJason Cahill. Agent ID: USS-CI-5484ID Class: 01542-5454Height: 5'5"Weight: 125Languages: English, Spanish, French, Russian, Italian, GermanTraining/Special Skills: Electromagnetic lock picking While she was teaching one of her classes, she heard a phone ring and thought it wasone of her student's, when it actually was her own. Nancy panicked for some odd reason and left the classroom. She then began to see a bald thug holstering a silenced pistol. Thinking he was trying to kill her, she held out her own. One of her students came out of class and she became delirious, saying random phrases in German. A few seconds later, she abruptly pointed the gun under her chin and shot herself in front of the student.
